name: lexnova-runtime-api
description: Lex Nova HQ Cloud Run runtime API for server-side model execution.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check src/env.js && node --check src/routes/diligenceStageRoutes.js && node --check src/routes/liveDiligenceRoutes.js && node --check src/live/liveDiligenceRunOrchestrator.js && node --check src/diligence/stageRunner.js && node --check src/diligence/stageRunnerLocked.js && node --check src/diligence/targetFeatureProfileSchemaRepair.js && node --check src/diligence/stageSchemaValidator.js && node --check src/diligence/legalStackReviewGuardrails.js && node --check src/diligence/registryLedgerGuardrails.js && node --check src/diligence/stage9ReportAssembler.js && node --check src/handoff/stage9ToVaultHandoffAdapter.js && node --check src/report-renderer/legalExposureReportRenderer.js && npm run test:stage4-stage5-guardrails
scripts.test:stage4-stage5-guardrails: node src/diligence/adapters/sourceBundleAdapter.v2.test.mjs && node src/diligence/adapters/targetFeatureProfileInputAdapter.test.mjs && node src/diligence/targetFeatureProfileSchemaRepair.test.mjs && node src/diligence/targetFeatureProfileGuardrails.test.mjs && node src/diligence/evidenceJunction.test.mjs
